author: codex-gpt5

patch.value: Warn on global service and renderer override footguns

GitHub issue #96: registerService("output_format") and registerRenderer overrides can silently replace output for every command, while extension doctor still reports the extension healthy. Duplicate check: pm search for service renderer override output_format corrupt output doctor warning found no open direct duplicate. Desired outcome: extension doctor/runtime should surface unsafe global override behavior and docs should explain pass-through/null fallback contracts.

message: Track GitHub #96 from gh issue audit.
